posts.author: BakingWithBella
posts.text: Just spent the morning perfecting my sourdough loaf! Finally got that crusty texture I've been aiming for. It smells amazing in the kitchen and I can't wait to share it with friends tomorrow. #SourdoughLife #BakingSuccess
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless personal update about a hobby (baking) without threats, scams, or private details.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: LilyAndTheWillow
posts.text: Honestly, I'm sick of the city council trying to force through these ridiculous parking bans in Oakhaven. They've got absolutely zero respect for local businesses that survive on foot traffic. The app just keeps flagging my posts about it as 'nuisance' but it's just common sense civic frustration.
posts.explanation: This post expresses lawful political criticism and civic frustration regarding government policy without containing a threat, targeted abuse, or harmful false claim. It is acceptable content that does not violate moderation policies.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: NorthbridgeNexus42
posts.text: Quick notice for everyone: The Northbridge Community Library is running its annual summer maintenance schedule from Tuesday 15th to Thursday 17th. We'll be reshelving the fiction collection and updating the digital catalogue system during these hours.
posts.explanation: This post is a benign notice about local library maintenance and does not contain threats, scams, or private information, so it should be approved.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: ListingLark92
posts.text: Need some urgent payment verification for a new service listing! Just reply to this post with your bank sort code, account number and 3D Secure code to prove you're not a bot. The link in the bio has all the details on how to transfer funds securely. #PaymentUpdates #Urgent
posts.explanation: This post solicits sensitive payment credentials and bank account details as part of a fake verification process, which is a clear fraud violation.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: BellmereWatcher
posts.text: Official warning: The Bellmere Savings & Loan is facing a critical liquidity crisis. Citizens are urged to withdraw all funds immediately and move money to the 'Safe Haven' digital wallet before the platform goes offline at midnight. This document is verified by the Ministry of Finance. Do not trust local banks. #FinancialAlert #BellmereNews
posts.explanation: The post promotes a fabricated financial emergency to cause panic and bank runs, utilizing an official-looking but unverified document. It requires specialist escalation for FinancialEconomic misinformation as it could lead to real-world harm.

posts.author: PippaFromGreyford
posts.text: Just popped round to my neighbour's house and saw this fluffy tabby cat on her doorstep. She was out for a walk with the dog but left him behind when she got caught in that sudden drizzle. It's so nice having friends like that! #Neighbours #RainyDay
posts.explanation: The post describes an everyday, harmless social interaction without promoting harm or sharing private information.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: ClayVineArt
posts.text: Finally managed to restore the old oak bench in the community garden! Took me a while to strip down and refinish, but it's looking much better now. #GardenRestore #DIY
posts.explanation: This is a harmless post about a legitimate DIY project with no safety concerns or harmful claims.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: JennaMills24
posts.text: Right then, my brother-in-law has absolutely no idea how to operate a washing machine! He's been trying to figure out the settings for an hour now while I'm just standing there watching him. Honestly, it's a bit frustrating but at least he's not burning the house down. #FamilyLife
posts.explanation: The post shares a lighthearted family anecdote with mild frustration but contains no abuse, private information, or safety concerns.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: JennaVale
posts.text: Honestly, that person in the comments section is being incredibly rude and dismissive of everyone else's opinions. They keep interrupting and belittling people without any reason to. I'm just reporting it because it's not acceptable behaviour here.
posts.explanation: The post criticises rude behaviour in the comments without attacking the individual, directing a pile-on, or revealing private information.
